feature: [EXPERIMENTAL] drift_nudge MCP tool with BaselineManager and git-event invalidation
evidence: 31 tests in tests/test_nudge.py: 7 nudge API schema tests (schema_version, direction, full schema, expected_transient, agent_instruction, cached baseline, error handling), 3 safe_to_commit hardrule tests (safe when clean, blocks on critical, blocks on expired), 2 invalidate baseline tests, 4 MCP tool tests (importable, JSON return, comma parsing, stdio-safety), 1 MCP instructions test, 6 BaselineManager singleton tests (identity, reset, store/get, empty, expired, invalidate), 5 git-event invalidation tests (HEAD, stash, many files, no change, no git), 2 nudge-manager integration tests. Full regression: 1293 passed, 0 failed.

phase_4_drift_nudge.impact: nudge() API function with IncrementalSignalRunner, safe_to_commit hardrule (3 rules: critical/high findings, delta > 0.05, expired baseline), drift_nudge MCP tool, server instructions update

phase_5_baseline_management.impact: BaselineManager singleton with git-event invalidation (HEAD commit, stash hash, changed file count > 10), _GitState tracking, nudge() integration via BaselineManager.get()/store()

phase_6_documentation.impact: Temporal Model section in DEVELOPER.md documenting incremental_scope convention, Design Dimensions (Diagnosis vs Navigation) in ROADMAP.md
